transcript: Oh my gosh! Hi, foxes! You want me to come say hi? You want me to come say hi? Yes? Excuse me, excuse me, excuse me. Hi, Finniken. Hi, Dixie. Oh, my gosh. Hi, Finn. Dixie. Finn again. He wants to go for a W-A-L-K.
